title: Silky Adventurous Tunisian Trout Stir-fry
description: A garlicky and silky Tunisian-inspired dish featuring sous-vide cooked trout with a touch of adventure, ready in under half an hour.

ingredients.name: Chili garlic paste
ingredients.notes: To enhance flavors, adjust to taste

instructions: Prep the trout by soaking it in water for about 15 minutes and then sous-vide cooking at 72°C (162°F) for about an hour.
Blend together garlic cloves, soy sauce, lemon juice, olive oil, red pepper flakes, chili garlic paste, and thyme leaves until smooth. Season with salt to taste.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat, add some olive oil, then pour in the prepared sauce and stir-fry for about 1-2 minutes until thickened.
Place the sous-vide cooked trout fillets into the hot skillet, ensuring they are fully coated with the sauce. Cook for another minute or two until evenly glazed and heated through.
